name: universal-model-router
description: The ultimate AI model router - route requests between OpenAI, Anthropic, local models, and more

scripts.bench: cd bench && docker-compose down -v 2>/dev/null; docker-compose up -d mock-server litellm-db litellm apimap && echo 'Waiting for services...' && sleep 15 && docker-compose --profile benchmark run --rm benchmark; docker-compose down -v
scripts.bench:full: cd bench && docker-compose down -v 2>/dev/null; BENCHMARK_ALL_PROTOCOLS=true docker-compose up -d mock-server litellm-db litellm apimap && echo 'Waiting for services...' && sleep 15 && BENCHMARK_ALL_PROTOCOLS=true docker-compose --profile benchmark run --rm benchmark; docker-compose down -v
scripts.bench:quick: cd bench && docker-compose down -v 2>/dev/null; BENCHMARK_SCENARIOS='1:5,5:6' docker-compose up -d mock-server litellm-db litellm apimap && echo 'Waiting for services...' && sleep 15 && BENCHMARK_SCENARIOS='1:5,5:6' docker-compose --profile benchmark run --rm benchmark; docker-compose down -v
